phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale della Galleria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh del-lah gal-leh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: All'ingresso principale, verso Piazza del Duomo.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahll-'eenj-REH-ssoh preen-chee-PAH-leh VEHR-soh pee-AHTS-tsah DEHL doo-OH-moh
likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, towards Piazza del Duomo.

responses.english: At the main entrance, towards Piazza del Duomo.
responses.phonetic: ahll-'eenj-REH-ssoh preen-chee-PAH-leh VEHR-soh pee-AHTS-tsah DEHL doo-OH-moh
responses.french: All'ingresso principale, verso Piazza del Duomo.

phrases.text_local: Dove sono i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: DOH-veh SOH-noh ee BAH-nee pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the lower floor, near the exit.

responses.english: On the lower floor, near the exit.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, bisogna prenotare per entrare nella Galleria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, bee-SOH-nyah preh-noh-TAH-reh per en-TRAH-reh NEL-lah gal-leh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It's on the right, near the entrance.

responses.english: It's on the right, near the entrance.
